\title{Supplementary Material Test}
\authorsnames{Jane Doe}
\authorsaffiliations{{University of Amsterdam}}
\abstract{A test abstract.}
\keywords{test}
\volume{1}
\pubnumber{1}
\pubyear{2025}
\firstpage{1}
\doi{10.0000/suppmat}

% Fallback definition for authors whose vendored ccr.cls predates the macro.
% Harmless if upstream ccr.cls already defines it.
\providecommand{\supplementarymaterial}[1]{#1}

\begin{document}
\maketitle

\section{Introduction}
Some text.\footnote{\supplementarymaterial{All materials: \url{https://doi.org/10.17605/OSF.IO/TQRJ3}}}

\supplementarymaterial{Bare reference: \url{https://example.org/extra}}

\end{document}
